description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in MyBulletinBoard (MyBB) before 1.0 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) month, (2) day, and (3) year parameters in an addevent action in calendar.php; (4) threadmode and (5) showcodebuttons in an options action in usercp.php; (6) list parameter in an editlists action to usercp.php; (7) rating parameter in a rate action in member.php; and (8) rating parameter in either showthread.php or ratethread.php.
